svg.text: The pole is the one axis every act is measured on: did this move toward the goal (the + terminal, top) or toward raw button-mash (the −

text.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "Berkeley Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Fira Code", monospace

svg.text: terminal, bottom)? self-force propels the agent up the axis; back-force resists. observe.py gates an act against the pole, relation_ledger.py

text.font-family: "JetBrains Mono", "IBM Plex Mono", "Berkeley Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Fira Code", monospace

svg.text: measures it, over_containment.py discriminates predictive from trivial. Not shown: panel 2 (metabolism) · panel 3 (tiers).
